1766220.name: Sweet Surrender Soundtrack
1766220.description:
Enjoy 22 custom-tailored tracks featuring the music of Sweet Surrender VR!

Spanning several tracks for each of the game's districts, you will dive into a synth and guitar driven soundscape which both harkens back to classic game sounds (with a particular nod to the amazing Mega Drive/Genesis Sound) and merges more contemporary synth tones with an ever-present guitar backdrop.

Composed and produced by Filippo Beck Peccoz.
